case_title: ELEC KOENIGSBERG VS. ANTHONY BELLACOSA et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOENIGSBERG, ELEC SERVED OCT-24-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BELLACOSA, ANTHONY
